function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_systick_timer.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_systick_timer
description: >
  Verifies the SysTick timer of mspm33c321a_derivative. Tests cover underflow
  interrupt generation when the counter reaches zero from a programmed reload
  value, tick interval accuracy for a given reload, and enable/disable
  behaviour (counter halts when disabled, resumes from reload when re-enabled).
checklist_ids:
  - SYSTICK-01
  - SYSTICK-02
  - SYSTICK-03
test_names:
  - test_systick_underflow_irq
  - test_systick_reload_interval
  - test_systick_enable_disable
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices: []

systick_params:
  reload_value: 0x000003E7    # 999 → 1000-cycle period at 80 MHz = 12.5 µs
  clock_source: core_clk     # CPU clock (80 MHz)

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; SysTick counter disabled at reset
  - step: 2
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: SYSTICK0
    register: RVR
    value: 0x000003E7
    description: Write reload value 999 to SysTick Reload Value Register
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: SYSTICK0
    register: CVR
    value: 0x00000000
    description: Clear current value register (triggers reload from RVR)
  - step: 4
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: SYSTICK0
    register: CSR
    value: CLKSOURCE_BIT | TICKINT_BIT | ENABLE_BIT
    description: Enable SysTick with core clock, enable underflow interrupt
  - step: 5
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 25
    timeout_cycles: 2000
    description: Wait for SysTick underflow IRQ (IRQ25) to fire
  - step: 6
    action: record_underflow_time
    description: Record simulation time at which underflow IRQ fires
  - step: 7
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 25
    timeout_cycles: 2000
    description: Wait for second underflow to measure interval
  - step: 8
    action: verify_interval
    expected_cycles: 1000
    tolerance_cycles: 2
    description: Verify interval between consecutive underflows is 1000 cycles ±2
  - step: 9
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: SYSTICK0
    register: CSR
    value: 0x00000000
    description: Disable SysTick (clear ENABLE bit)
  - step: 10
    action: read_cvr_twice
    delay_cycles: 500
    description: Read CVR at time T and T+500 cycles; verify value is frozen
  - step: 11
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: SYSTICK0
    register: CSR
    value: CLKSOURCE_BIT | TICKINT_BIT | ENABLE_BIT
    description: Re-enable SysTick
  - step: 12
    action: check_cvr_decrementing
    description: Verify CVR resumes counting down from reload value after re-enable

checks:
  - id: CHK-SYSTICK-01
    checklist_id: SYSTICK-01
    description: SysTick underflow IRQ fires when CVR transitions from 1 to 0
    expected: IRQ25 asserts after 1000 clk cycles from enable
  - id: CHK-SYSTICK-02
    checklist_id: SYSTICK-02
    description: Interval between consecutive underflows equals reload value + 1 cycles
    expected: Interval = 1000 cycles ±2 cycles
  - id: CHK-SYSTICK-03
    checklist_id: SYSTICK-03
    description: CVR freezes when ENABLE=0; resumes counting when ENABLE reasserted
    expected: CVR unchanged over 500 cycles while disabled; decrements after re-enable

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-SYSTICK checks PASS
  - SysTick interval matches configured reload value to within 2 cycles
  - No spurious IRQ25 while SysTick disabled
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

args.file_text:
scenario_name: scenario_systick_timer
description: >
  Verifies the SysTick timer of mspm33c321a_derivative. Tests cover underflow
  interrupt generation when the counter reaches zero from a programmed reload
  value, tick interval accuracy for a given reload, and enable/disable
  behaviour (counter halts when disabled, resumes from reload when re-enabled).
checklist_ids:
  - SYSTICK-01
  - SYSTICK-02
  - SYSTICK-03
test_names:
  - test_systick_underflow_irq
  - test_systick_reload_interval
  - test_systick_enable_disable
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices: []

systick_params:
  reload_value: 0x000003E7    # 999 → 1000-cycle period at 80 MHz = 12.5 µs
  clock_source: core_clk     # CPU clock (80 MHz)

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; SysTick counter disabled at reset
  - step: 2
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: SYSTICK0
    register: RVR
    value: 0x000003E7
    description: Write reload value 999 to SysTick Reload Value Register
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: SYSTICK0
    register: CVR
    value: 0x00000000
    description: Clear current value register (triggers reload from RVR)
  - step: 4
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: SYSTICK0
    register: CSR
    value: CLKSOURCE_BIT | TICKINT_BIT | ENABLE_BIT
    description: Enable SysTick with core clock, enable underflow interrupt
  - step: 5
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 25
    timeout_cycles: 2000
    description: Wait for SysTick underflow IRQ (IRQ25) to fire
  - step: 6
    action: record_underflow_time
    description: Record simulation time at which underflow IRQ fires
  - step: 7
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 25
    timeout_cycles: 2000
    description: Wait for second underflow to measure interval
  - step: 8
    action: verify_interval
    expected_cycles: 1000
    tolerance_cycles: 2
    description: Verify interval between consecutive underflows is 1000 cycles ±2
  - step: 9
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: SYSTICK0
    register: CSR
    value: 0x00000000
    description: Disable SysTick (clear ENABLE bit)
  - step: 10
    action: read_cvr_twice
    delay_cycles: 500
    description: Read CVR at time T and T+500 cycles; verify value is frozen
  - step: 11
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: SYSTICK0
    register: CSR
    value: CLKSOURCE_BIT | TICKINT_BIT | ENABLE_BIT
    description: Re-enable SysTick
  - step: 12
    action: check_cvr_decrementing
    description: Verify CVR resumes counting down from reload value after re-enable

checks:
  - id: CHK-SYSTICK-01
    checklist_id: SYSTICK-01
    description: SysTick underflow IRQ fires when CVR transitions from 1 to 0
    expected: IRQ25 asserts after 1000 clk cycles from enable
  - id: CHK-SYSTICK-02
    checklist_id: SYSTICK-02
    description: Interval between consecutive underflows equals reload value + 1 cycles
    expected: Interval = 1000 cycles ±2 cycles
  - id: CHK-SYSTICK-03
    checklist_id: SYSTICK-03
    description: CVR freezes when ENABLE=0; resumes counting when ENABLE reasserted
    expected: CVR unchanged over 500 cycles while disabled; decrements after re-enable

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-SYSTICK checks PASS
  - SysTick interval matches configured reload value to within 2 cycles
  - No spurious IRQ25 while SysTick disabled
